text:
> Synopsis: portsentry 1.2 is available

> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback

> State-Changed-When: Thu Sep 28 16:32:43 UTC 2006
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Care to provide a patch?

For what do you need a patch?

You have to remove the new line in portsentry.c in line 1584.

The rest compiles without any problems.

Dr. Markus Waldeck
